lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.
This vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor wear on the interior and exterior. All mechanical components are in working order, and the car has been regularly maintained.

Experience perfection with this stunning find! This car is in absolute mint condition, looking and performing exactly like it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. The exterior is flawless, the interior is pristine, and it drives like a dream. It’s truly a rare opportunity to own a vehicle this well-preserved!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or as a major restoration project. The exterior has significant body damage, including heavy rust and several large dents, while the paint is severely oxidized. Mechanically, the car requires immediate and extensive repairs to the engine and transmission to be safely drivable. The interior is also in rough shape, with torn seating and multiple non-functional electrical components. This car will need to be towed from the lot.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior shows some scratches and minor dents. The interior has visible wear on the seats and carpet. Mechanical systems are operational but will require routine maintenance.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be fully roadworthy. The exterior displays several noticeable dents, a large area of peeling clear coat on the hood, and visible rust along the rocker panels. Inside, the interior shows heavy wear with stained upholstery and a cracked dashboard. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a loud knocking sound, and the suspension needs a complete overhaul. This car is being sold as-is and is best suited for someone looking for a project or a source for parts.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, preserved in showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits meticulous care, featuring a flawless exterior and an interior that maintains its original factory integrity. For the serious enthusiast seeking a vehicle of unrivaled caliber, this offering represents a singular opportunity for acquisition.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy, and honestly, she’s a total dream. This car is in truly pristine condition—it looks and feels like it just left the dealership! I’ve taken such good care of it, so there isn't a single scratch or blemish to be found. It drives like a cloud and is ready for its next big adventure. If you're looking for something that’s basically brand new without the showroom price tag, you’ve gotta come see this beauty for yourself!
Available is a meticulously preserved E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its signature
Pristine condition. No scratches or dents. Smoke-free interior. Full service history. Runs like new.

Presented in absolute showroom condition, this vehicle is a rare find for the discerning collector or enthusiast. The exterior boasts its original factory paint, exhibiting a deep, mirror-like luster free from any swirl marks, stone chips, or door dings. It has been meticulously garage-kept under a breathable cover and recently treated with a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple with no bolstering wear, and the 'new car' scent persists. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the climate control, functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history exclusively through authorized dealerships. The engine bay is detailed and spotless, showing no signs of aging or fluid seepage. With exceptionally low mileage and a documented history of adult ownership, this vehicle offers a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it left the assembly line. This is a turn-key investment for someone seeking the absolute best example of this model available today.

This vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, it presents in showroom condition with no discernible wear to the interior or exterior surfaces. Every mechanical and aesthetic detail has been scrutinized to ensure it meets the requirements of the most discerning collector. Experience unparalleled performance and prestige in a motorcar that remains indistinguishable from its original delivery state.

Presented for your consideration is an exemplary specimen of automotive engineering, maintained to a concours-level standard. This vehicle remains in an unblemished state, both aesthetically and mechanically, representing the absolute pinnacle of its class. Every detail has been meticulously preserved to ensure an unrivaled driving experience for the discerning collector. We invite you to acquire this peerless investment in performance and prestige.

Hey everyone! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy, and let me tell you, it is a total stunner! This car has been babied since day one and is in truly spectacular, showroom-ready condition. It drives like an absolute dream and honestly feels brand new. If you're looking for something that's been loved and kept in pristine shape, this is the one for you! Feel free to reach out with any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home.
Offering a museum-grade 2011 BMW M3 Coupe (E92) featuring the legendary S65 4.0L
Used car. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Single owner. Service records available.

Offered here is a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, maintained to a standard rarely seen on the secondary market. This vehicle presents in showroom condition, boasting a flawless exterior finish with deep, mirror-like luster and zero imperfections, chips, or swirl marks. The interior remains pristine, smelling factory-fresh with supple leather, crisp upholstery, and every electronic component functioning exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach; it has been exclusively serviced at authorized centers with a comprehensive paper trail, always stored in a climate-controlled environment, and never driven in inclement weather. From the spotless engine bay to the unmarked alloy wheels wrapped in premium rubber, this car represents the pinnacle of its class for a discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We invite you to experience this masterfully maintained vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Every facet of this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to preservation, from its flawless finish to its meticulously curated interior. For the discerning buyer seeking an investment-grade specimen, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle remains in pristine condition, reflecting a standard of maintenance that exceeds even the most discerning expectations. Every surface, mechanical component, and aesthetic detail has been preserved to an impeccable degree, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original debut. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a benchmark-quality vehicle for the true connoisseur.

Hey there! You have seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It’s in truly pristine, mint condition and has been babied since day one—always garage-kept and sparkling clean! Honestly, it looks and drives just like it rolled off the showroom floor. If you're looking for a ride that’s practically brand new and ready for your next adventure, this is the one. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love it!

Offering a collector-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six with individual throttle bodies and a fully overhauled VANOS system. This specimen boasts a reinforced rear subframe and fresh rod bearings, addressing critical preventative maintenance items. Power is delivered through a precise Getrag six-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock,
